mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3E — Provenance Self-Knowledge Answer Packet Bridge

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
import hashlib
import json

root = Path("Z:/FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3E"
installed = root / "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks = [
    (drop / "provenance_self_knowledge_answer_packet_bridge_v1.py", installed / "provenance_self_knowledge_answer_packet_bridge_v1.py", "ad501eff2f8162a319085aa4eb6368039e9757e89ee4eaccb11e5f6e446ca6a7"),
    (drop / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_BRIDGE_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_BRIDGE_CONTRACT_V1.json", "0afdc9d5527d9b906e328bec951f3e21ffa9ebd041f427f505d3386ddef1510a"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3E.md", installed / "README_V1A3E.md", "b10285df2ee17d411168b959ceb010bebfd9e77739f54110eb1fc4807e514f18"),
]
for source, target, expected_hash in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), source
    assert target.is_file(), target
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash

script_text = (installed / "provenance_self_knowledge_answer_packet_bridge_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "provenance_self_knowledge_answer_packet_bridge_v1.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(script_text)
imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden = {
    "subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests",
    "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser", "importlib",
}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract = json.loads((installed / "SELF_KNOWLEDGE_BRIDGE_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260722-001310-533BE2"
assert contract["source_registry_mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-235244-7594A9"
assert contract["supported_intent_count"] == 11
assert len(contract["supported_intents"]) == 11
assert contract["minimum_test_request_count"] == 24
assert contract["locally_verified_test_request_count"] >= 24
assert len(contract["outputs"]) == 6
assert contract["scope"]["claim_level_provenance_required"] is True
assert contract["scope"]["runtime_facts_inferred_across_contexts"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["closure_node_records_copied"] == 0
assert contract["scope"]["closure_edge_records_copied"] == 0
assert contract["scope"]["live_source_files_scanned_or_parsed"] == 0
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3E_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3E payloads, syntax, eleven-intent contract, and zero forbidden imports
Run request normalization, provenance, intent-count, and test-count self-tests
Hash-verify the seven authoritative V1A-3D registry inputs before answering
Build deterministic schemas, intent catalog, tests, examples, and bridge receipt
Validate exact six-output set, eleven intents, thirty-four tests, provenance, and safety boundaries
Run validation-only mode across all six contexts and four launchers
Generate deterministic Workshop Main runtime-uncertainty answer packet without alias resolution
